name: Verde Agritech Plc
summary: Verde Agritech Plc, an agri-tech company, explores for and develops mineral properties primarily in Brazil. The company produces and sells K Forte, a multinutrient potassium fertilizer; and Super Greensand, a fertilizer and a soil conditioner. It holds 100% interests in the Cerrado Verde project, which is the source of potassium silicate rock, a glauconitic siltstone material located in the western Alto Paranaiba region of Minas Gerais State, Brazil. The company was formerly known as Verde Potash PLC and changed its name to Verde Agritech Plc in June 2016. Verde Agritech Plc was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Belo Horizonte, Brazil.
